pre_amp.Drive Character: How the drive feels when you play
pre_amp.Low End: Bass tightness before it hits the amp

amp.Mid Range: Where the mids sit in the mix
amp.Gain Behavior: How the amp breaks up and distorts
amp.Power Response: How the power section feels and responds

cabinet.Speaker Character: The tone of the speaker and enclosure

room_mic.Mic Placement: How close the microphone is to the speaker
room_mic.Room Character: The space and ambience around the cabinet
room_mic.Mic Tone: The tonal character of the microphone itself

post_cab.Spatial Character: What the space and reflections sound like

pre_amp.ui_description: Pulls back the overdrive. More headroom, less grit.
pre_amp.rationale: Decrease drive/gain — pull back overdrive or reduce amp input

pre_amp.ui_description: Pushes the overdrive harder. Crunchier, more saturated.
pre_amp.rationale: Increase drive staging — push amp harder or add overdrive pedal gain

pre_amp.ui_description: Thick, woolly fuzz saturation. Think Big Muff or Fuzz Face.
pre_amp.rationale: Heavy fuzz saturation — add or increase fuzz pedal, beyond overdrive territory

pre_amp.ui_description: Softer clipping edges, less bite. Rolls off the harshness.
pre_amp.rationale: Roll back drive/tone to soften clipping edges

pre_amp.ui_description: Hot-rodded front end. Harder clipping, tighter attack.
pre_amp.rationale: Hot-rod the front end — more clipping, tighter attack

pre_amp.ui_description: Bright, touch-sensitive shimmer in the clean-to-edge range.
pre_amp.rationale: Light touch sensitivity with high-frequency shimmer — clean boost with treble emphasis

pre_amp.ui_description: Cuts low-end flub before the amp. Punchier, more focused bass.
pre_amp.rationale: Reduce low-end flub before the amp — cut bass on overdrive or add low-cut

amp.ui_description: More treble and presence. Cuts through the mix more.
amp.rationale: Increase treble/presence controls on the amp

amp.ui_description: Less top-end bite. Warmer, rounder, less harsh.
amp.rationale: Decrease treble/presence — warmer, less top-end bite

amp.ui_description: Thicker, rounder tone. Less treble, more mid and bass.
amp.rationale: Decrease treble, bump mid and bass for thicker, rounder tone

amp.ui_description: High-frequency sparkle and ring. Think Vox AC30 top-boost.
amp.rationale: High-frequency sparkle — think Vox AC30 top-boost character

amp.ui_description: Cut mids heavily. V-shaped EQ — big lows and highs, thin middle.
amp.rationale: Cut mids heavily — aggressive V-shaped EQ (metal, hard rock)

amp.ui_description: Push the mids up. Cuts through a band mix. Blues, classic rock.
amp.rationale: Push mids for cutting through a mix — blues, classic rock

amp.ui_description: Nasal, focused mid-range peak. Wah-like resonance.
amp.rationale: Narrow mid-range boost for nasal, wah-like resonance — focused midrange character

amp.ui_description: Edge of breakup. Amp just starting to clip on pick attack.
amp.rationale: Edge-of-breakup — amp just starting to clip on pick attack

amp.ui_description: Smooth, singing sustain. High gain with prominent mids — notes flow.
amp.rationale: Smooth sustaining lead — high gain with prominent mids, notes sing

amp.ui_description: Crystal-clear clean, hi-fi clarity. Fender Twin or Roland JC territory.
amp.rationale: Very clean, hi-fi clarity — no breakup, crisp Fender/Roland-style headroom

amp.ui_description: Untamed, unprocessed character. Zero polish, all attitude.
amp.rationale: Unprocessed, no-BS character — minimal EQ shaping, amp does the talking

amp.ui_description: Loose, blooming response. Notes swell and compress naturally. Vintage.
amp.rationale: Loose power amp response — notes bloom and compress naturally, vintage feel

amp.ui_description: Tight, immediate response. Fast transients, modern feel.
amp.rationale: Tight, immediate power amp response — fast transients, modern feel

cabinet.ui_description: Closed-back cabinet. Focused, punchy low end. Fast response.
cabinet.rationale: Closed-back cab — focused, punchy low end with fast transient response

cabinet.ui_description: Open-back cabinet. Wider, airier low end. More room interaction.
cabinet.rationale: Open-back cab — wider, less focused low end with more natural room interaction

cabinet.ui_description: Organic, resonant tone. Alnico speakers, warm low-mids.
cabinet.rationale: Organic, resonant tone — open-back with alnico speakers, warm low-mids

cabinet.ui_description: Thin, vintage speaker character. Old worn cones, low headroom.
cabinet.rationale: Thin, vintage speaker character — old Jensens, worn cones, low headroom

cabinet.ui_description: Prominent mid-range resonance from a small closed cab. Can be nasal.
cabinet.rationale: Small closed cab with prominent mid-range resonance — typically undesirable, reduce with EQ

cabinet.ui_description: Deep, heavy low-end thump. Large 4x12 closed-back, big speakers.
cabinet.rationale: Deep, heavy low-end thump — large 4x12 closed-back, high-wattage speakers

room_mic.ui_description: Mic right on the speaker. Maximum direct sound, minimal room.
room_mic.delta: MCP X-Fade minimal (mic on grille) / CRP mic on cap, room_mix minimal
room_mic.rationale: Mic right on the speaker — maximum direct sound, minimal room

room_mic.ui_description: Clear and upfront without being harsh. Balanced mic placement.
room_mic.delta: MPos → Cap Edge, Mic → Dyn 57 or Con 87
room_mic.rationale: Clear and upfront without being harsh — balanced mic placement

room_mic.ui_description: Mic pulled back. More room character, softer transients, natural depth.
room_mic.delta: MCP X-Fade +0.20–0.40 / CRP mic on cone, room_size +0.20–0.30
room_mic.rationale: Mic pulled back — more room character, softer transients, natural depth

room_mic.ui_description: Close, dry space. Small room, mic tight on the speaker.
room_mic.delta: MCP X-Fade -0.05–0.10 / CRP room_size -0.10–0.20, mic closer
room_mic.rationale: Close, dry space — small room, mic tight on the speaker

room_mic.ui_description: Prominent room sound. Hear the space around the cabinet.
room_mic.rationale: Prominent room sound — larger CRP room, more room mic blend

room_mic.ui_description: Large reflective space. Natural ambience, like a live tracking room.
room_mic.rationale: Large reflective space — think live tracking room with natural ambience

room_mic.ui_description: Heavily treated room. No reflections, very dry cabinet tone.
room_mic.delta: MCP X-Fade minimal / CRP room_size minimal, room_mix minimal
room_mic.rationale: Heavily treated room — absorptive, no reflections, very dry cabinet tone

room_mic.ui_description: Natural room ambience and high-frequency shimmer. The sound of space around the cabinet — not reverb.
room_mic.delta: MCP X-Fade +0.10–0.20 / CRP room_size +0.10–0.20, high shelf +0.05–0.15
room_mic.rationale: Natural room ambience and high-frequency shimmer — increase CRP room size, move mic back slightly, boost high shelf. Not the same as reverb — air is the sound of the physical space around the cabinet

room_mic.ui_description: Smooth, rolled-off top end. Ribbon mic character — tames harshness.
room_mic.rationale: Smooth, rolled-off top end — ribbon mic character, tames harshness

room_mic.ui_description: Bright, forward, biting. SM57 right on the dust cap — maximum attack.
room_mic.rationale: Bright, forward, present — SM57 on dust cap, maximum bite

room_mic.ui_description: Gentle top end. Ribbon or condenser pulled off-cap for a softer sound.
room_mic.delta: Mic → Rib 121, MPos → Cap Edge or Cone
room_mic.rationale: Gentle top end — ribbon or condenser pulled off-cap

room_mic.ui_description: Extended high-frequency response. Condenser captures every nuance.
room_mic.rationale: Extended high-frequency response — condenser captures nuance and detail

post_cab.ui_description: More reverb and space around the guitar. Lusher, wetter.
post_cab.rationale: Increase reverb mix and/or decay — more space around the guitar

post_cab.ui_description: Less reverb and delay. Tighter, more direct, in-your-face.
post_cab.rationale: Decrease reverb/delay mix — or remove spatial effects entirely

post_cab.ui_description: Longer reverb tail, more pre-delay. Sounds like a larger space.
post_cab.rationale: Longer reverb tail with more pre-delay — sounds like a larger space

post_cab.ui_description: Blurred, atmospheric. High delay feedback and reverb — ambient territory.
post_cab.rationale: Blurred, atmospheric — high delay feedback and reverb mix, ambient territory

post_cab.ui_description: Rich, enveloping texture. Modulation and reverb adding movement.
post_cab.rationale: Rich, enveloping texture — modulation and/or reverb adding movement

post_cab.ui_description: Modulated or pitch-shifted reverb. Ethereal high-end sparkle.
post_cab.rationale: Modulated reverb or pitch-shifted reflections — ethereal high-end sparkle, ambient guitar

post_cab.ui_description: Short delay ~80-150ms. Rockabilly, country, vintage vibe.
post_cab.rationale: Short delay ~80-150ms with minimal feedback — rockabilly, country, vintage feel

post_cab.ui_description: Clean, uncoloured effects. Minimal processing artefacts, hi-fi.
post_cab.rationale: Clean, uncoloured effects — minimal processing artefacts, hi-fi character

post_cab.ui_description: Degraded signal quality. Bit reduction, sample rate crunch, tape hiss.
post_cab.rationale: Degraded signal quality — bit reduction, sample rate reduction, or tape saturation

post_cab.ui_description: Warm compression and soft harmonics. Tape machine character.
post_cab.rationale: Warm compression and soft harmonics — tape machine character

post_cab.ui_description: Higher ratio, lower threshold. More sustain, less dynamic range.
post_cab.rationale: Increase compression — higher ratio, lower threshold, more gain reduction

post_cab.ui_description: Less compression. More dynamic range, more touch sensitivity.
post_cab.rationale: Reduce compression — lower ratio, higher threshold, more dynamic range

post_cab.ui_description: Attack-focused compression. Fast response that emphasises the snap.
post_cab.rationale: Attack-focused compression — fast response emphasises transient snap
